ValidationRule.description: Limit the action on checkbox "Proposed HOC validation" to User with position HOC
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ischanged( Proposed_HOC_approval__c ) , OR( NOT(ispickval($User.Position__c, 'Head of Country')), NOT(CONTAINS($User.TECH_TextBusinessDevelopmentRegions__c , Proposed_Contact_Owner_Business_Region__c)) ), !$User.BypassValidationRules__c)
ValidationRule.errorMessage: This box is intended for the Head of Country from the proposed business region
